/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/static_thread_local_test.dir/static_thread_local_test.cc.o -o ../runtime_output_directory/static_thread_local_test
